case_title: KAMPOL CREWS VS. SPA CHAKRA, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREWS, KAMPOL AS TO DEFENDANT SPA CHAKRA, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SPA CHAKRA - SAN FRANCISCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREWS, KAMPOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPA CHAKRA, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SPA CHAKRA - SAN FRANCISCO $5,407.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,612.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
